name: gitwarp
description: Worktree isolation, dispatch, context, and task records for concurrent coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Git worktree isolation, dispatch, and task records for agents
interface.longDescription: Use GitWarp to enter with context, dispatch or start isolated git worktree sandboxes, inspect dossiers, hand off progress, audit state, and finish safely.
defaultPrompt: Run gitwarp enter --cwd "$PWD" before repository work.
Dispatch or start an isolated workspace with a GitWarp task dossier for concurrent agent tasks.
Inspect context and read task.md, progress.md, and lessons.md before editing inside a sandbox.
